name: Kong Ingress Controller
description: Kubernetes-native API gateway that extends Kong Gateway to manage ingress traffic, API routing, and traffic policies for microservices.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Apache APISIX
description: Cloud-native API gateway delivering high performance, observability, and extensible plugin ecosystem for microservices and APIs.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Traefik
description: Modern cloud-native reverse proxy and ingress controller with automatic service discovery, Let's Encrypt integration, and dynamic configuration.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Envoy Gateway
description: Kubernetes Gateway API implementation powered by Envoy Proxy, providing expressive and extensible traffic routing and management.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Kgateway
description: Kubernetes-native API gateway built on Envoy Proxy, supporting the Gateway API with advanced traffic management and transformation capabilities.
author: OpenChoreo

name: WSO2 API Platform Gateway
description: WSO2 API Platform Gateway is a modern, high-performance gateway designed to manage, secure, and govern API traffic through a unified, policy-driven model.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Argo Workflows
description: Kubernetes-native workflow engine for orchestrating parallel jobs, CI/CD pipelines, and complex DAG-based workflows.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Tekton Pipelines
description: Cloud-native CI/CD framework providing Kubernetes-native building blocks for creating and running continuous integration and delivery pipelines.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Logs - OpenSearch
description: Observability logs module that uses OpenSearch for log storage, querying and log based alertting. Uses Fluent Bit for log collection.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Logs - OpenObserve
description: Observability logs module that uses OpenObserve for log storage and querying. Uses Fluent Bit for log collection.
author: OpenChoreo

name: FinOps - OpenCost
description: FinOps module that uses OpenCost for Kubernetes cost monitoring of OpenChoreo workloads.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Flux CD
description: Continuous delivery solution for Kubernetes that keeps clusters in sync with sources of configuration using a declarative, GitOps approach.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Argo CD
description: Declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes that automates application deployment and lifecycle management from Git repositories.
author: OpenChoreo

name: GitHub Actions
description: Automate software workflows with CI/CD pipelines directly in GitHub, supporting build, test, and deployment with a rich ecosystem of reusable actions.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Jenkins
description: Extensible open source automation server for building, testing, and deploying software with hundreds of plugins for CI/CD pipelines.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Tracing - OpenSearch
description: Tracing module that uses OpenSearch for trace storage and querying. Uses OpenTelemetry Collector for trace collection.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Metrics - Prometheus
description: Metrics module that uses Prometheus for metrics collection, storage, querying and alerting.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Tracing - OpenObserve
description: Observability tracing module that uses OpenObserve for trace storage and querying. Uses OpenTelemetry Collector for trace collection.
author: OpenChoreo

name: WSO2 Agent Manager
description: Open control plane for deploying, managing, and governing AI agents at scale on Kubernetes. Provides lifecycle management, governance, observability, and evaluation for AI Agents.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Agent Gateway
description: AI-native gateway for OpenChoreo providing unified LLM routing across multiple providers and MCP federation for AI agent communication.
author: OpenChoreo

name: WSO2 API Platform AI Gateway
description: AI-native gateway built on the WSO2 API Platform runtime, providing model-aware routing, LLM passthrough, and token & cost control for components that consume LLM APIs.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Agent Sandbox
description: Kernel-level sandbox isolation for AI agent workloads using kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox, supporting gVisor and Kata Containers runtimes with pre-warmed sandbox pools for fast agent startup.
author: OpenChoreo

name: WSO2 Micro Integrator
description: OpenChoreo component type for deploying WSO2 Micro Integrator integration projects with a built-in build pipeline for Maven-based .car deployments.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Logs - Moesif
description: Observability logs module that collects container logs using Fluent Bit and exports them to Moesif via OpenTelemetry Collector.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Logs - AWS CloudWatch
description: The Observability Logs Module for AWS CloudWatch sends OpenChoreo application logs to your AWS CloudWatch account and exposes them through the OpenChoreo Portal, CLI, and MCP servers, with support for log-based alerts.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Logs - Azure Log Analytics
description: The Observability Logs Module for Azure Log Analytics queries OpenChoreo application logs from a Log Analytics workspace populated by the AKS Container Insights addon, and exposes them through the OpenChoreo Portal, CLI, and MCP servers, with support for log-based alerts via Azure Monitor scheduled query rules.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Metrics - AWS CloudWatch
description: The Observability Metrics Module for AWS CloudWatch sends OpenChoreo application and resource metrics to your AWS CloudWatch account and exposes them through the OpenChoreo Portal, CLI, and MCP servers, with support for metric-based alerts.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Tracing - AWS X-Ray
description: The Observability Tracing Module for AWS X-Ray collects OpenChoreo application traces and stores them in your AWS X-Ray account, exposing them through the OpenChoreo Portal, CLI, and MCP servers, with support for scope-based trace querying.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Networking - Cilium
description: Networking module for configuring CiliumNetworkPolicies and Hubble-based network observability in OpenChoreo.
author: OpenChoreo

name: AWS RDS PostgreSQL
description: Self-service workflow to provision and deprovision AWS RDS PostgreSQL instances using Terraform, enabling developer self-service database creation without platform team involvement.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Azure SQL Database
description: Self-service workflow to provision and deprovision Azure SQL Databases using Terraform, enabling developer self-service database creation without platform team involvement.
author: OpenChoreo

name: SCM Create Repository
description: Generic workflows to create source code repositories in GitHub or AWS CodeCommit, enabling automated repository provisioning as part of developer self-service.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Ballerina Buildpack Builder
description: Component build workflow for building applications written in Ballerina.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Dockerfile Builder
description: Component build workflow that builds with a provided Dockerfile, Containerfile, or Podmanfile.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Google Cloud Buildpacks Builder
description: Component build workflow that supports building Go, Java, Node.js, Python, and .NET applications.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Paketo Buildpacks Builder
description: Component build workflow that supports building Java, Node.js, Python, Go, .NET, Ruby, PHP, and more.
author: OpenChoreo

name: SRE Agent
description: AI agent that assists platform and operations teams with diagnosing incidents, analyzing observability data, and suggesting remediation across OpenChoreo deployments.
author: OpenChoreo

name: FinOps Agent
description: AI agent that helps teams analyze cloud costs and identify optimization opportunities
author: OpenChoreo

name: Portal Assistant
description: AI agent that lets teams chat with OpenChoreo from the Backstage portal to inspect projects, components, and runtime telemetry in natural language.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Developer
description: Skill for application developers shipping services on OpenChoreo. Helps deploy and update Components, Workloads, and ReleaseBindings, trigger builds, connect components, manage env vars and secrets, and promote across Environments.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Platform Engineer
description: Skill for platform engineers and operators running the OpenChoreo control plane. Helps author ComponentTypes, Traits, and Workflows, manage Environments and DeploymentPipelines, register planes, and configure secrets, identity, authorization, and gateways.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Setup
description: Skill for fresh OpenChoreo installs. Bootstraps OpenChoreo onto local k3d or an existing Kubernetes cluster (k3s, GKE, EKS, AKS, DOKS, Rancher Desktop, or self-managed), walks the official install guide for the chosen target, applies provider-specific workarounds, and provisions the default platform resources.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Platform Engineer GitOps
description: Skill for platform engineers running OpenChoreo via GitOps. Scaffolds a GitOps repo (pristine, platform-only, or active cluster), wires Flux CD, and authors platform CRDs (ComponentTypes, Traits, Workflows, Environments, DeploymentPipelines, SecretReferences, AuthzRoles, alert rules, notification channels) via Git.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Developer GitOps
description: Skill for application developers working in an OpenChoreo GitOps repo. Onboards Components (BYO image or source-build), configures workloads, attaches platform-authored traits, connects components, promotes releases across environments, applies per-environment overrides, and verifies Flux reconciliation.
author: OpenChoreo

name: OpenChoreo Import
description: Plans an OpenChoreo migration from a Helm chart, Kustomize overlay, Docker Compose file, or raw Kubernetes YAML. Renders the source, classifies what fits OpenChoreo's primitives, surfaces a fit verdict, and produces an interactive plan with per-Project apply steps. Plans only — never applies to a cluster.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Service
description: A request-serving workload like a backend API or microservice. Listens on one or more endpoints and stays running to handle incoming traffic. Runs as a Kubernetes Deployment.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Web Application
description: An HTTP-serving frontend or full-stack web app, such as a single-page app, server-rendered app, or static site with a build step. Exposes at least one HTTP endpoint that end users hit in the browser. Runs as a Kubernetes Deployment.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Worker
description: A background or event-driven workload that doesn't accept inbound requests, such as a queue consumer, stream processor, event handler, or long-running agent. Stays running and pulls work or reacts to events. Runs as a Kubernetes Deployment.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Scheduled Task
description: A batch job that runs to completion on a recurring schedule, such as a report, cleanup, or periodic data sync. Starts, does its work, and exits until the next scheduled time. Runs as a Kubernetes CronJob.
author: OpenChoreo

name: Sample GitOps Workflows
description: A collection of sample workflows for GitOps-based delivery, including building container images from Dockerfiles, Google Cloud Buildpacks, or React sources with a GitOps release, and bulk-promoting releases across environments.
author: OpenChoreo
